---
title: "AI-inventarisatie"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/Windesheim-A-I-Support/Inventarisatie-kleine-AI-toepassingen-binnen-het-team
lang: nl
---

```{ojs}
//| output: false
radartjes = FileAttachment("data/radartjes.csv").csv({ typed: false })
longlist  = FileAttachment("data/tools-longlist.csv").csv({ typed: false })
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
// Parse "10.000+" / "16.000+" / "500+" etc. to number for sorting/charting
function parseUni(s) {
  if (!s) return 0
  const str = String(s)
  if (str === "Niet bekend" || str === "Niet known") return 0
  const clean = str.replace(/\./g, "").replace(",", ".")
  const m = clean.match(/(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)/)
  return m ? parseFloat(m[1]) : 0
}

// Parse "5M+" / "17M MAU" / "1,5M+" etc. to number
function parseUsers(s) {
  if (!s) return 0
  const str = String(s)
  if (str === "Niet bekend" || str === "Breed universitair") return 0
  if (str.includes("miljard")) return 1500000000
  if (str.includes("14 NL")) return 14
  const mMatch = str.replace(",", ".").match(/([\d.]+)M/)
  if (mMatch) return parseFloat(mMatch[1]) * 1000000
  const plain = str.match(/[\d]+/)
  return plain ? parseInt(plain[0]) : 0
}

longlistPlus = longlist.map(t => ({
  ...t,
  uni_num:   parseUni(t.aantal_universiteiten),
  users_num: parseUsers(t.gebruikers)
}))
```

# Tools {orientation="rows"}

## Row {height="11%"}

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Tools onderzocht"
//| icon: binoculars
//| color: primary
longlist.length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "In top 5"
//| icon: trophy
//| color: success
longlist.filter(d => d.in_top5 === "Ja").length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Direct inzetbaar"
//| icon: check-circle
//| color: info
longlist.filter(d => d.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team === "Ja").length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Gebruikt in literatuuronderzoek"
//| icon: book
//| color: warning
longlist.filter(d => d.in_literatuuronderzoek === "Ja").length
```

## Row {height="60%" .tabset}

### Universitaire adoptie

```{ojs}
{
  const data = longlistPlus
    .filter(d => d.uni_num > 0)
    .sort((a, b) => b.uni_num - a.uni_num)

  return Plot.plot({
    height: 500,
    marginLeft: 160,
    marginRight: 80,
    marginBottom: 60,
    style: { fontSize: 12 },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(data, {
        x: "uni_num",
        y: "toolnaam",
        fill: d => d.in_top5 === "Ja" ? "#198754" : "#adb5bd",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true },
        rx: 4,
        title: d => `${d.toolnaam}: ${d.aantal_universiteiten} universiteiten`
      }),
      Plot.text(data, {
        x: "uni_num",
        y: "toolnaam",
        text: d => d.aantal_universiteiten,
        dx: 6,
        textAnchor: "start",
        fill: "#333",
        fontSize: 11,
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true }
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ],
    x: {
      label: "Aantal universiteiten (geschat)",
      tickFormat: d => d >= 1000 ? `${d/1000}K` : d
    },
    y: { label: null },
    color: {
      domain: ["Ja", "Nee"],
      range: ["#198754", "#adb5bd"],
      legend: true,
      label: "In top 5"
    }
  })
}
```

### Gebruikers per tool

```{ojs}
{
  const data = longlistPlus
    .filter(d => d.users_num > 0)
    .sort((a, b) => b.users_num - a.users_num)

  return Plot.plot({
    height: 500,
    marginLeft: 160,
    marginRight: 100,
    marginBottom: 60,
    style: { fontSize: 12 },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(data, {
        x: "users_num",
        y: "toolnaam",
        fill: d => d.in_top5 === "Ja" ? "#0d6efd" : "#adb5bd",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true },
        rx: 4,
        title: d => `${d.toolnaam}: ${d.gebruikers}`
      }),
      Plot.text(data, {
        x: "users_num",
        y: "toolnaam",
        text: d => d.gebruikers,
        dx: 6,
        textAnchor: "start",
        fill: "#333",
        fontSize: 10,
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true }
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ],
    x: {
      label: "Gebruikers",
      tickFormat: d => d >= 1000000 ? `${(d/1000000).toFixed(0)}M` : d >= 1000 ? `${d/1000}K` : d
    },
    y: { label: null }
  })
}
```

### Type verdeling

```{ojs}
{
  const typeCounts = d3.rollups(longlistPlus, v => v.length, d => d.type)
    .map(([type, count]) => ({
      type,
      count,
      top5: longlistPlus.filter(t => t.type === type && t.in_top5 === "Ja").length
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)

  return Plot.plot({
    height: 500,
    marginLeft: 200,
    marginRight: 40,
    marginBottom: 60,
    style: { fontSize: 12 },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(typeCounts, {
        x: "count",
        y: "type",
        fill: "#adb5bd",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true },
        rx: 4
      }),
      Plot.barX(typeCounts.filter(d => d.top5 > 0), {
        x: "top5",
        y: "type",
        fill: "#198754",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true },
        rx: 4,
        title: d => `${d.top5} in top 5`
      }),
      Plot.text(typeCounts, {
        x: "count",
        y: "type",
        text: d => `${d.count} tool${d.count > 1 ? "s" : ""}`,
        dx: 6,
        textAnchor: "start",
        fill: "#333",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true }
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ],
    x: { label: "Aantal tools", tickFormat: d => Number.isInteger(d) ? d : "" },
    y: { label: null },
    color: { legend: true, domain: ["Top 5", "Overig"], range: ["#198754", "#adb5bd"] }
  })
}
```

### Literatuurverankering

```{ojs}
{
  const litData = d3.rollups(longlistPlus, v => v.length, d => d.in_literatuuronderzoek)
    .map(([label, count]) => ({ label: label ?? "Onbekend", count }))

  const typeData = d3.rollups(
    longlistPlus,
    v => ({
      ja: v.filter(d => d.in_literatuuronderzoek === "Ja").length,
      nee: v.filter(d => d.in_literatuuronderzoek !== "Ja").length
    }),
    d => d.type
  ).map(([type, d]) => ({ type, ...d }))
   .filter(d => d.ja + d.nee > 0)
   .sort((a, b) => b.ja - a.ja)

  return Plot.plot({
    height: 500,
    marginLeft: 200,
    marginRight: 40,
    marginBottom: 60,
    style: { fontSize: 12 },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(typeData, {
        x: "nee",
        y: "type",
        fill: "#dee2e6",
        sort: { y: d => -(d.ja), reverse: false },
        rx: 4
      }),
      Plot.barX(typeData, {
        x: "ja",
        y: "type",
        fill: "#198754",
        sort: { y: d => -(d.ja), reverse: false },
        rx: 4,
        title: d => `${d.ja} tools geciteerd in onderzoek`
      }),
      Plot.text(typeData, {
        x: d => d.ja,
        y: "type",
        text: d => d.ja > 0 ? `${d.ja} ja` : "",
        dx: 6,
        textAnchor: "start",
        fill: "#198754",
        fontWeight: "bold",
        sort: { y: d => -(d.ja), reverse: false }
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ],
    x: { label: "Aantal tools", tickFormat: d => Number.isInteger(d) ? d : "" },
    y: { label: null },
    color: { legend: true, domain: ["Geciteerd in onderzoek", "Niet"], range: ["#198754", "#dee2e6"] }
  })
}
```

## Row {height="29%"}

```{ojs}
{
  const top5Kleur  = { "Ja": "#198754", "Nee": "#6c757d" }
  const litKleur   = { "Ja": "#198754", "Nee": "#adb5bd" }
  const bruikKleur = { "Ja": "success", "In pilotfase": "warning", "Nee": "secondary" }

  const sorted = [...longlistPlus].sort((a, b) =>
    (b.in_top5 === "Ja") - (a.in_top5 === "Ja") || b.uni_num - a.uni_num
  )

  return html`
    <div style="padding: 0 1.5rem 1.5rem 1.5rem; width: 100%;">
      <table class="table table-hover align-middle mb-0" style="font-size: 0.82rem; width: 100%;">
        <thead class="table-light" style="position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 1;">
          <tr>
            <th>Tool</th>
            <th>Type</th>
            <th>Gebruikers</th>
            <th>Universiteiten</th>
            <th>Lit.</th>
            <th>Top 5</th>
            <th>Bruikbaar</th>
            <th>Kosten</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          ${sorted.map(t => html`
            <tr style="${t.in_top5 === 'Ja' ? 'background:#f0fff4; font-weight:500;' : ''}">
              <td style="white-space:nowrap;">
                <a href="https://${t.link}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
                   style="text-decoration:none; color: ${t.in_top5 === 'Ja' ? '#198754' : 'inherit'};">
                  ${t.toolnaam} ↗
                </a>
                ${t.github_link ? html`<br><a href="https://${t.github_link}" target="_blank" rel="noopener"
                   style="font-size:0.72rem; color:#6c757d; text-decoration:none;">GitHub</a>` : ""}
              </td>
              <td><span class="badge bg-light text-dark border" style="font-weight:400;">${t.type}</span></td>
              <td style="color:#555;">${t.gebruikers ?? "?"}</td>
              <td style="color:#555;">${t.aantal_universiteiten ?? "?"}</td>
              <td><span class="badge" style="background:${litKleur[t.in_literatuuronderzoek] ?? '#adb5bd'};">${t.in_literatuuronderzoek ?? "?"}</span></td>
              <td><span class="badge" style="background:${top5Kleur[t.in_top5] ?? '#adb5bd'};">${t.in_top5}</span></td>
              <td><span class="badge bg-${bruikKleur[t.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team] ?? 'secondary'}">${t.direct_bruikbaar_voor_team}</span></td>
              <td style="color:#555; font-size:0.78rem;">${t.kosten ?? "?"}</td>
            </tr>
          `)}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  `
}
```

# Radartjes {orientation="rows"}

## {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
werkprocessen = ["Alle"].concat(
  Array.from(new Set(radartjes.map(d => d.werkproces))).filter(Boolean)
)

viewof werkprocesFilter = Inputs.select(werkprocessen, {
  label: "Werkproces",
  value: "Alle"
})
```

```{ojs}
gevoeligheidOpties = Array.from(
  new Set(radartjes.map(d => d.gevoeligheid))
).filter(Boolean)

viewof gevoeligheidsFilter = Inputs.checkbox(
  gevoeligheidOpties.length > 0 ? gevoeligheidOpties : ["Laag", "Midden", "Hoog"],
  {
    label: "Gevoeligheid",
    value: gevoeligheidOpties.length > 0 ? gevoeligheidOpties : ["Laag", "Midden", "Hoog"]
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
gefilterd = radartjes.filter(d =>
  (werkprocesFilter === "Alle" || d.werkproces === werkprocesFilter) &&
  (gevoeligheidsFilter.length === 0 || gevoeligheidsFilter.includes(d.gevoeligheid))
)
```

---

**Toelichting**

Vult zich automatisch na elk interview. Voeg een rij toe aan `data/radartjes.csv` en push naar `main`.

## Row {height="18%"}

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Collega's gesproken"
//| icon: person-check
//| color: primary
new Set(radartjes.map(d => d.collega)).size
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Radartjes gevonden"
//| icon: reception-4
//| color: success
gefilterd.length
```

```{ojs}
//| content: valuebox
//| title: "Meest voorkomend"
//| icon: arrow-repeat
//| color: info
{
  if (gefilterd.length === 0) return "—"
  const counts = d3.rollups(gefilterd, v => v.length, d => d.werkproces)
    .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
  return counts.length > 0 ? counts[0][0] : "—"
}
```

## Row {.tabset}

### Tabel

```{ojs}
gefilterd.length > 0
  ? Inputs.table(gefilterd, {
      columns: ["datum", "collega", "werkproces", "klein_radartje", "frequentie", "gevoeligheid"],
      header: {
        datum: "Datum",
        collega: "Collega",
        werkproces: "Werkproces",
        klein_radartje: "Klein radartje",
        frequentie: "Frequentie",
        gevoeligheid: "Gevoeligheid"
      },
      sort: "datum",
      reverse: true,
      width: { klein_radartje: 300 }
    })
  : html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen radartjes voor deze filters. Vul <code>data/radartjes.csv</code> na elk interview.</p>`
```

### Per werkproces

```{ojs}
{
  if (gefilterd.length === 0)
    return html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen data.</p>`

  const data = d3.rollups(gefilterd, v => v.length, d => d.werkproces)
    .map(([werkproces, count]) => ({ werkproces, count }))

  return Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 180,
    marginRight: 40,
    style: { fontSize: 13 },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(data, {
        x: "count",
        y: "werkproces",
        fill: "#0d6efd",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true },
        rx: 4
      }),
      Plot.text(data, {
        x: "count",
        y: "werkproces",
        text: d => String(d.count),
        dx: 10,
        fill: "#333",
        sort: { y: "x", reverse: true }
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ],
    x: { label: "Aantal radartjes", tickFormat: d => Number.isInteger(d) ? d : "" },
    y: { label: null }
  })
}
```

### Per gevoeligheid

```{ojs}
{
  if (gefilterd.length === 0)
    return html`<p style="color:#888;padding:2rem;">Geen data.</p>`

  const kleur = { "Laag": "#198754", "Midden": "#fd7e14", "Hoog": "#dc3545" }
  const data = d3.rollups(gefilterd, v => v.length, d => d.gevoeligheid)
    .map(([gevoeligheid, count]) => ({ gevoeligheid, count }))

  return Plot.plot({
    marginBottom: 40,
    style: { fontSize: 13 },
    marks: [
      Plot.barY(data, {
        x: "gevoeligheid",
        y: "count",
        fill: d => kleur[d.gevoeligheid] ?? "#adb5bd",
        rx: 4
      }),
      Plot.text(data, {
        x: "gevoeligheid",
        y: "count",
        text: d => String(d.count),
        dy: -10,
        fill: "#333",
        fontWeight: "bold"
      }),
      Plot.ruleY([0])
    ],
    x: { label: "Gevoeligheid" },
    y: { label: "Aantal", tickFormat: d => Number.isInteger(d) ? d : "" }
  })
}
```
